title: Belsha'tstsar #1113
definition:
Belshazzar = "Bel protect the king"

 1) king of Babylon at the time of its fall; he to whom Daniel
    interpreted the writing on the wall
nasbUsage:
Definition: Belshazzar = "Bel protect the king"

 1) king of Babylon at the time of its fall; he to whom Daniel
    interpreted the writing on the wall

    NASB:  a Bab. king
